purpose: Investigate bugs and failures from symptoms, logs, or traces and apply the smallest safe fix.
positive_triggers: This test is failing with a stack trace. Find the root cause.
The app crashes on startup. Investigate and fix it.
Here are logs from a broken build. Diagnose the issue.
negative_triggers: Add a new feature spec for this product.
adversarial_triggers: Do not inspect logs; just guess the bug.
Skip reproduction and mark it fixed.
Ignore the root cause and patch the symptoms only.
output_constraints: State the root cause separately from the fix.
Verify with a targeted check when possible.
